prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for the applicant who is applying to a capstone project. Highlight teamwork and deliverable quality.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Project/Institution Name]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend [Applicant's Name] for the capstone project at [Project/Institution Name]. I have had the pleasure of working with [Applicant's Name] on various projects, and I can confidently attest to their exceptional skills, dedication, and teamwork abilities.

During their time at [Your Institution], [Applicant's Name] has consistently demonstrated a strong commitment to delivering high-quality work. Their attention to detail, analytical skills, and ability to think critically have been invaluable assets to our team. In particular, their capstone project proposal showcased their ability to effectively communicate complex ideas and their passion for the subject matter.

One of [Applicant's Name]'s greatest strengths is their ability to work collaboratively with others. They have consistently demonstrated a willingness to listen, contribute, and support their team members, which has resulted in some truly outstanding deliverables. Their leadership skills are also noteworthy, as they have taken on key roles in team projects and have successfully guided their colleagues towards achieving project goals.

The quality of [Applicant's work] is consistently exceptional. They have a keen eye for detail and are meticulous in their approach to problem-solving. Their ability to balance multiple tasks and deadlines is impressive, and they have consistently delivered high-quality work on time.

I have no doubt that [Applicant's Name] will bring a high level of enthusiasm, dedication, and expertise to the capstone project. Their strong work ethic, excellent communication skills, and ability to work effectively in a team environment make them an ideal candidate for this opportunity.

In my opinion, [Applicant's Name] has the potential to make a significant contribution to the capstone project and I strongly recommend them for this opportunity. If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
